{{Quote|Four-Eighteen and Four-Twenty are down.|A stormtrooper, reporting to Imperial Intelligence's agent Kirtan Loor|<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />}}
'''Four-Twenty''' was the designation of an individual who served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Empire and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Shortly after a [[Raid on Talasea|raid]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]]<ref name="Rogue Squadron" /> in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the individual was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a trap left by New Republic forces. The raid was intended to eliminate [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], an elite New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. Four-Twenty's death, along with the death of stormtrooper [[Four-Eighteen]], would later be reported to [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Kirtan Loor]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The stormtrooper was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />
